Figure 7

Siyuan Huang

2025-12-07

Load libraries

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(lemon)
library(showtext)
library(Rmisc)
library(patchwork)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(forcats)

Font and theme settings

showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

# Register the Arial font if present (its path varies by OS); otherwise fall
# back to the default sans-serif family so figures render on any machine.
arial_path <- c(
  "C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf",                        # Windows
  "/Library/Fonts/Arial.ttf",                          # macOS
  "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/Arial.ttf"  # Linux (msttcorefonts)
)
arial_path <- arial_path[file.exists(arial_path)][1]

if (!is.na(arial_path)) {
  font_add(family = "Arial", regular = arial_path)
  theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "Arial"))
} else {
  theme_set(theme_classic())
}

Load utilities and import data

source("plot_util_test.R")

data_raw <- read_excel("data/Plot_Data.xlsx")

data_filtered <- data_raw[data_raw$stage1_task0_accuracy < 0.9, ]

MAR model setup (used for panels a–d EMMs)

data_mar <- data_filtered %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Used_LLM_Hours = fct_collapse(
      as.character(Used_LLM_Hours),
      None = "0",
      Low  = c("1–5", "6–10"),
      High = c("11–20", ">20")
    ),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("AI", "AI Human", "Human")),
    ID = as.factor(ID)
  )

format_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) {
    "italic(p)~'= NA'"
  } else if (p < .001) {
    "italic(p)~'< .001'"
  } else {
    sprintf("italic(p)~'= %s'", sub("^0", "", sprintf("%.3f", p)))
  }
}

# Fit Phase * Label MAR model and return EMMs marginalised over Label + pairwise contrasts
get_phase_mar <- function(data, vars, phase_short_labels) {
  cols <- unname(vars)
  keep_cols <- c("ID", "Label", "Age", "Gender", "Field", "Used_LLM_Hours", cols)
  sub_dat <- as.data.frame(data)[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  long_dat <- tidyr::pivot_longer(
    sub_dat,
    cols = dplyr::all_of(cols),
    names_to = "varname",
    values_to = "Value"
  )
  long_dat$Phase <- factor(
    names(vars)[match(long_dat$varname, vars)],
    levels = names(vars)
  )
  long_dat <- long_dat[!is.na(long_dat$Value), ]

  model <- lmer(
    Value ~ Phase * Label + Age + Gender + Field + Used_LLM_Hours + (1 | ID),
    data = long_dat
  )

  emm <- emmeans(model, ~ Phase)
  emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)
  emm_df <- dplyr::rename(emm_df, mean = emmean, lower = lower.CL, upper = upper.CL)
  emm_df$Phase_short <- factor(
    phase_short_labels[as.character(emm_df$Phase)],
    levels = phase_short_labels
  )
  emm_df$ci <- (emm_df$upper - emm_df$lower) / 2

  pairs_df <- as.data.frame(pairs(emm, adjust = "tukey"))

  list(emm = emm_df, pairs = pairs_df, n = length(unique(long_dat$ID)))
}

Panel (a): AI trust (pre, post, follow-up)

res31_all <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered,
  label_col = c("Pre_AI_Trust", "Post_AI_Trust"),
  new_columns_name = c("Pre_task", "Post_task"),
  data_columns = c("Pre_task", "Post_task"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Pre task", "Post task"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Pre task", "Post task"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

res31_1 <- res31_all$stats_summary

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c("Label", "Pre_AI_Trust", "Post_AI_Trust", "follow_AI_Trust")]
data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_AI_Trust), ]

res31_fu <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered2,
  label_col = c("Pre_AI_Trust", "Post_AI_Trust", "follow_AI_Trust"),
  new_columns_name = c("Pre_task", "Post_task", "Follow_up"),
  data_columns = c("Pre_task", "Post_task", "Follow_up"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", "", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

res31_2 <- res31_fu$stats_summary

res31_1$Label <- "All participants"
res31_2$Label <- "Follow-up completers"

df_combined31 <- bind_rows(res31_2, res31_1) %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("All participants", "Follow-up completers")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean,
    ci_pct = ci95
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_plot))

all_y_pre1 <- df_combined31 %>%
  filter(Label == "All participants", x_plot == 1) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

all_y_post1 <- df_combined31 %>%
  filter(Label == "All participants", x_plot == 2) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fu_y_pre1 <- df_combined31 %>%
  filter(Label == "Follow-up completers", x_plot == 1) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fu_y_follow1 <- df_combined31 %>%
  filter(Label == "Follow-up completers", x_plot == 3) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fig31 <- ggplot(df_combined31, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Label, linetype = Label), color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Label, fill = Label), color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  geom_curve(
    aes(x = 2.05, xend = 2.05, y = all_y_pre1, yend = all_y_post1),
    curvature = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 2.05, y = 3.22,
    label = "italic(p)~'< .001'",
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_curve(
    aes(x = 3.05, xend = 3.05, y = fu_y_pre1, yend = fu_y_follow1),
    curvature = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 3.05, y = 3.29,
    label = "italic(p)~'< .001'",
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = 21, "Follow-up completers" = 21),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "black", "Follow-up completers" = "white"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "solid", "Follow-up completers" = "dashed"),
    labels = expression(
      "All participants (" * italic(N) * " = 175)",
      "Follow-up completers (" * italic(N) * " = 84)"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(3, 4, 0.25), limits = c(3, 4), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 3, yend = 3), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 3, y = 3, yend = 3), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AI trust") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3, 4), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = c(0.36, 0.93),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 1)),
    linetype = "none",
    shape = "none"
  )

print(fig31)

Panel (b): AI affect (pre, post, follow-up)

res32_all <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered,
  label_col = c("Pre_AI_Affect", "Post_AI_Affect"),
  new_columns_name = c("Pre_task", "Post_task"),
  data_columns = c("Pre_task", "Post_task"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Pre task", "Post task"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Pre task", "Post task"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

res32_1 <- res32_all$stats_summary

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c("Label", "Pre_AI_Affect", "Post_AI_Affect", "follow_AI_Affect")]
data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_AI_Affect), ]

res32_fu <- data_preprocessing(
  data = data_filtered2,
  label_col = c("Pre_AI_Affect", "Post_AI_Affect", "follow_AI_Affect"),
  new_columns_name = c("Pre_task", "Post_task", "Follow_up"),
  data_columns = c("Pre_task", "Post_task", "Follow_up"),
  one_names_values = "Phase",
  one_values_values = "Rating",
  after_columns_name = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up"),
  phase_subtitle_name = c("", "", ""),
  phase_short_name = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up"),
  groupby_col = NULL
)

res32_2 <- res32_fu$stats_summary

res32_1$Label <- "All participants"
res32_2$Label <- "Follow-up completers"

df_combined32 <- bind_rows(res32_2, res32_1) %>%
  mutate(
    Phase_short = factor(Phase_short, levels = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up")),
    Label = factor(Label, levels = c("All participants", "Follow-up completers")),
    x_plot = as.numeric(Phase_short),
    mean_pct = mean,
    ci_pct = ci95
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_plot))

all_y_pre <- df_combined32 %>%
  filter(Label == "All participants", x_plot == 1) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

all_y_post <- df_combined32 %>%
  filter(Label == "All participants", x_plot == 2) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fu_y_pre <- df_combined32 %>%
  filter(Label == "Follow-up completers", x_plot == 1) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fu_y_follow <- df_combined32 %>%
  filter(Label == "Follow-up completers", x_plot == 3) %>%
  pull(mean_pct)

fig32 <- ggplot(df_combined32, aes(x = x_plot, y = mean_pct)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = Label, linetype = Label), color = "black", size = 0.5, alpha = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pct - ci_pct, ymax = mean_pct + ci_pct),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5, alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = Label, fill = Label), color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1) +
  geom_curve(
    aes(x = 2.05, xend = 2.05, y = all_y_pre, yend = all_y_post),
    curvature = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 2.05, y = 3.93,
    label = "italic(p)~'= .013'",
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_curve(
    aes(x = 3.05, xend = 3.05, y = fu_y_pre, yend = fu_y_follow),
    curvature = 0.3, linewidth = 0.5, color = "black", linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = 3.05, y = 3.97,
    label = "italic(p)~'= .002'",
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = 21, "Follow-up completers" = 21),
    labels = c(
      "All participants" = "All participants",
      "Follow-up completers" = "Follow-up completers"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "black", "Follow-up completers" = "white"),
    labels = c(
      "All participants" = "All participants",
      "Follow-up completers" = "Follow-up completers"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("All participants" = "solid", "Follow-up completers" = "dashed"),
    labels = c(
      "All participants" = "All participants",
      "Follow-up completers" = "Follow-up completers"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:3, labels = c("Pre task", "Post task", "Follow-up")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(3.5, 4.5, 0.25), limits = c(3.5, 4.5), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 3.5, yend = 3.5), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 3, y = 3.5, yend = 3.5), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AI affect") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3.5, 4.5), clip = "off") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  )

print(fig32)

Panel (c): Subjective AI literacy and AI self-efficacy (MAR EMM, N = 175)

# Gray ID lines: only the followup completers (paired observations)
data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c(
  "ID",
  "Label",
  "Pre_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy",
  "follow_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy"
)]

data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy), ]

df1 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "Pre_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy")]
df1$Group <- "Pre_task"
names(df1) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df2 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "follow_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy")]
df2$Group <- "Follow_up"
names(df2) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df12 <- bind_rows(df1, df2)
df12$Label <- "Subjective AI literacy"

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Label", "Pre_AI_Self_Efficacy", "follow_AI_Self_Efficacy")]
data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_AI_Self_Efficacy), ]

df3 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "Pre_AI_Self_Efficacy")]
df3$Group <- "Pre_task"
names(df3) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df4 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "follow_AI_Self_Efficacy")]
df4$Group <- "Follow_up"
names(df4) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df34 <- bind_rows(df3, df4)
df34$Label <- "AI self-efficacy"

df1234 <- bind_rows(df12, df34)
df1234$Group <- factor(df1234$Group, levels = c("Pre_task", "Follow_up"))

# Mean line / error bars / points: MAR-model EMMs and 95% CIs (N = 175)
mar_subj <- get_phase_mar(
  data_mar,
  vars = c(Pre = "Pre_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy",
           follow = "follow_AILS_CCS_Subjective_AI_Literacy"),
  phase_short_labels = c(Pre = "Pre_task", follow = "Follow_up")
)
mar_self <- get_phase_mar(
  data_mar,
  vars = c(Pre = "Pre_AI_Self_Efficacy", follow = "follow_AI_Self_Efficacy"),
  phase_short_labels = c(Pre = "Pre_task", follow = "Follow_up")
)

# MAR EMM means (N = 175)
mar_means <- bind_rows(
  mar_subj$emm %>% dplyr::mutate(Label = "Subjective AI literacy"),
  mar_self$emm %>% dplyr::mutate(Label = "AI self-efficacy")
)
mar_means$Group <- factor(as.character(mar_means$Phase_short), levels = c("Pre_task", "Follow_up"))

# Error bars: model-based 95% CI from the same MAR EMMs (N = 175)
morey_sum <- mar_means %>%
  dplyr::select(Group, Label, mean, ci) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(measure = mean)

p_subj <- mar_subj$pairs$p.value[mar_subj$pairs$contrast == "Pre - follow"]
p_self <- mar_self$pairs$p.value[mar_self$pairs$contrast == "Pre - follow"]

p_values <- data.frame(
  Label = c("Subjective AI literacy", "AI self-efficacy"),
  x = c(1.5, 1.5),
  y = c(4.95, 4.95),
  label_text = c(format_p(p_subj), format_p(p_self))
)

fig_33 <- ggplot(df1234, aes(x = Group, y = measure)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = ID), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 3, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure, ymin = measure - ci, ymax = measure + ci),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure),
    color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Label, nrow = 1) +
  geom_text(
    data = p_values,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label_text),
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(Label = "Subjective AI literacy", x = 2.5, y = 3, label = "Neutral"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    hjust = 0.83, vjust = -0.55, color = "black", size = 13 / .pt
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Rating") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 5), breaks = seq(1, 5, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Pre_task" = "Pre task", "Follow_up" = "Follow-up")) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 1.5),
    panel.spacing = unit(-1, "cm"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7))
  ) +
  coord_capped_cart(bottom = capped_horizontal(), left = capped_vertical())

print(fig_33)

Panel (d): Objective AI literacy

data_filtered1 <- data_filtered[, c("ID", "Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy", "follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy")]
data_filtered2 <- data_filtered1[!is.na(data_filtered1$follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy), ]

df34_1 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy")]
df34_1$Group <- "Pre_task"
names(df34_1) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df34_2 <- data_filtered2[, c("ID", "follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy")]
df34_2$Group <- "Follow_up"
names(df34_2) <- c("ID", "measure", "Group")

df34 <- bind_rows(df34_1, df34_2)
df34$measure <- df34$measure * 100
df34$Group <- factor(df34$Group, levels = c("Pre_task", "Follow_up"))
df34$Label <- "Objective AI literacy"

# Mean line / error bars / points: MAR-model EMMs and 95% CIs (N = 175), scaled to %
mar_obj <- get_phase_mar(
  data_mar %>% mutate(
    Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy = Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy * 100,
    follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy = follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy * 100
  ),
  vars = c(Pre = "Pre_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy",
           follow = "follow_GLAT_Objective_AI_Literacy"),
  phase_short_labels = c(Pre = "Pre_task", follow = "Follow_up")
)

# Error bars: model-based 95% CI from the same MAR EMMs (N = 175), scaled to %
morey_sum <- mar_obj$emm
morey_sum$Group <- factor(as.character(morey_sum$Phase_short), levels = c("Pre_task", "Follow_up"))
morey_sum$measure <- morey_sum$mean
morey_sum$Label <- "Objective AI literacy"

p_obj <- mar_obj$pairs$p.value[mar_obj$pairs$contrast == "Pre - follow"]

p_values <- data.frame(
  Label = "Objective AI literacy",
  x = 1.5,
  y = 98.75,
  label_text = format_p(p_obj)
)

fig_34 <- ggplot(df34, aes(x = Group, y = measure)) +
  geom_line(aes(group = ID), color = "gray80", alpha = 0.5, size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 25, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_line(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure, group = 1),
    color = "black", size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure, ymin = measure - ci, ymax = measure + ci),
    color = "black", width = 0, size = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = morey_sum,
    aes(x = Group, y = measure),
    color = "black", size = 4, stroke = 1,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Label) +
  geom_text(
    data = p_values,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label_text),
    parse = TRUE,
    size = 13 / .pt,
    hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = data.frame(Label = "Objective AI literacy", x = 2.5, y = 25, label = "Chance"),
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
    hjust = 0.83, vjust = -0.55, color = "black", size = 13 / .pt
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Accuracy (%)") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 20),
    limits = c(0, 100),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Pre_task" = "Pre task", "Follow_up" = "Follow-up")) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 13, vjust = 1.5),
    panel.spacing = unit(-1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7))
  ) +
  coord_capped_cart(bottom = capped_horizontal(), left = capped_vertical())

print(fig_34)

Combine panels and save figure

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(
  A = fig31, B = fig32, C = fig_33, D = fig_34,
  design = "ACD\nBCD"
) +
  plot_layout(
    widths = c(0.8, 0.8, 0.5),
    heights = c(1, 1)
  ) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "a", tag_suffix = ".") &
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "sans"),
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  )

print(combined_plot)

ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_3.pdf", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_3.png", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study2_3.svg", combined_plot, width = 14, height = 8, bg = "white")

Reproducibility
